name: transworld-engagement
releaseNote: Research Phase 2c (delivery tracking + analytics): a Resend webhook at /api/research/webhooks/resend (public, svix-verified with RESEND_WEBHOOK_SECRET) records delivered/opened/clicked/bounced/complained/failed back to send_log by resend_id; a hard bounce flips the subscriber to bounced and a spam complaint auto-unsubscribes them (research channel only — soft bounces are left alone). An Email analytics area at /research/admin/analytics (editorial sub-brand) with a campaigns rollup, a per-recipient drill-in (filter by opened/clicked/bounced/failed), list-health cards, and a hand-rolled 12-week trends chart. The dashboard Last-campaign stat and Email-analytics tile go live, and the reports list shows a Sent date + recipient count per report. Adds svix (webhook signature verification); no charting dependency (the trends chart is inline SVG); no schema change (send_log and report_subscriptions already carry every needed column). Adds one environment variable, RESEND_WEBHOOK_SECRET, on this release.
